mentions.note: In talks to sell Pizza Hut to Longrange Capital; remaining KFC + Taco Bell are amazing performers. Yum without Pizza Hut will trade much higher.
Amazing quarter; 8% same-store sales on superior speed, customer experience, loyalty. Brian Niccol disciples executing at scale.
Down to $153 (from $169) at 23x earnings; excellent growth with asset-light model; nice value meal business resilient to oil prices and economic weakness; good value play.
Recently downgraded; faces restaurant sector headwinds; can't pound table on food inflation.

Pizza Hut divestiture unlocks KFC/Taco Bell focus. Taco Bell 18% SSS growth, 1,200+ global units, massive expansion TAM. KFC international momentum strong (Korea +2x 3yr, UK on fire). $4B buyback shows confidence. Digital 60% of business, AI empowering team members. Parallels Darden/Red Lobster success.
